- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
Defaults confirmed and used: NestJS + TypeScript + PostgreSQL + Prisma + Redis + Swagger + Docker.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
NestJS project scaffolded in current root (`.`) with no extra project folder.

- [x] Customize the Project
Domain modules and route scaffolds were implemented for auth, job-cards, inventory, tasks, reports, finance, settings, notifications, sync, realtime, and health.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
No extensions were required by project setup tooling.

- [x] Compile the Project
Dependencies installed, Prisma client generated, and `npm run build` passes.

- [x] Create and Run Task
VS Code task created and run for development startup.

- [x] Launch the Project
Debug launch confirmed by user and started successfully with `SKIP_DB_CONNECT=true` fallback due missing local Docker runtime.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
README updated with project-specific setup and runtime guidance; this file cleaned of HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
